req.title: Manager deletes training-course
req.statement: An authenticated manager shall be able to delete a training-course through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for the requirement:
An authenticated manager shall be able to delete a training-course through the UI form.
Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from datetime import datetime


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def manager_user():
    """Return a user object with the Manager role."""
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = 42
    user.username = "jane.manager"
    user.role = "manager"
    user.is_authenticated = True
    return user


@pytest.fixture
def non_manager_user():
    """Return an authenticated user WITHOUT the Manager role."""
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = 99
    user.username = "john.employee"
    user.role = "employee"
    user.is_authenticated = True
    return user


@pytest.fixture
def unauthenticated_user():
    """Return an unauthenticated user."""
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = None
    user.username = None
    user.is_authenticated = False
    user.role = None
    return user


@pytest.fixture
def existing_training_course():
    """Return a minimal valid training-course record."""
    course = MagicMock()
    course.id = 101
    course.title = "Health & Safety Fundamentals"
    course.code = "HSF-001"
    course.is_active = True
    return course


@pytest.fixture
def audit_service():
    """Return a mock audit-log service."""
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def course_repository(existing_training_course):
    """Return a mock course repository pre-loaded with one course."""
    repo = MagicMock()
    repo.find_by_id.return_value = existing_training_course
    repo.delete.return_value = True
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def delete_form_valid(existing_training_course):
    """Simulate a submitted UI form that contains all mandatory fields."""
    form = MagicMock()
    form.is_submitted.return_value = True
    form.is_valid.return_value = True
    form.course_id.data = existing_training_course.id
    form.confirmation_token.data = "DELETE"       # e.g. user must type DELETE
    form.reason.data = "Course is outdated"
    form.errors = {}
    return form


@pytest.fixture
def delete_form_missing_course_id():
    """Simulate a submitted UI form where course_id is absent."""
    form = MagicMock()
    form.is_submitted.return_value = True
    form.is_valid.return_value = False
    form.course_id.data = None
    form.confirmation_token.data = "DELETE"
    form.reason.data = "No longer needed"
    form.errors = {"course_id": ["Course ID is required."]}
    return form


@pytest.fixture
def delete_form_missing_confirmation():
    """Simulate a submitted UI form where the confirmation token is missing."""
    form = MagicMock()
    form.is_submitted.return_value = True
    form.is_valid.return_value = False
    form.course_id.data = 101
    form.confirmation_token.data = ""
    form.reason.data = "No longer needed"
    form.errors = {"confirmation_token": ["You must type DELETE to confirm."]}
    return form


@pytest.fixture
def delete_form_missing_reason():
    """Simulate a submitted UI form where the deletion reason is absent."""
    form = MagicMock()
    form.is_submitted.return_value = True
    form.is_valid.return_value = False
    form.course_id.data = 101
    form.confirmation_token.data = "DELETE"
    form.reason.data = ""
    form.errors = {"reason": ["Reason for deletion is required."]}
    return form


@pytest.fixture
def delete_form_all_fields_missing():
    """Simulate a submitted UI form where every mandatory field is absent."""
    form = MagicMock()
    form.is_submitted.return_value = True
    form.is_valid.return_value = False
    form.course_id.data = None
    form.confirmation_token.data = ""
    form.reason.data = ""
    form.errors = {
        "course_id": ["Course ID is require
